description: Comprehensive Redpanda monitoring dashboard using native Prometheus metrics. Covers cluster health, throughput, topics, consumer groups, RPC internals, resources, and schema registry.
title: Redpanda Prometheus Overview

4ceb7c9a-3a1b-441d-8798-b982ae0c4676.description: Redpanda instance to filter metrics by
4ceb7c9a-3a1b-441d-8798-b982ae0c4676.name: redpanda_instance
4ceb7c9a-3a1b-441d-8798-b982ae0c4676.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'instance') AS `instance`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'redpanda_cluster_brokers'
GROUP BY `instance`
ORDER BY `instance` ASC

845257c7-a88f-4d35-b05d-968720ac4c4a.description: Redpanda topic to filter metrics by
845257c7-a88f-4d35-b05d-968720ac4c4a.name: redpanda_topic
845257c7-a88f-4d35-b05d-968720ac4c4a.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'redpanda_topic') AS `redpanda_topic`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'redpanda_kafka_partitions'
GROUP BY `redpanda_topic`
ORDER BY `redpanda_topic` ASC

991fdbe8-de84-42f5-bc23-b25c47d7bfa7.description: Redpanda consumer group to filter metrics by
991fdbe8-de84-42f5-bc23-b25c47d7bfa7.name: redpanda_group
991fdbe8-de84-42f5-bc23-b25c47d7bfa7.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'redpanda_group') AS `redpanda_group`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'redpanda_kafka_consumer_group_lag'
GROUP BY `redpanda_group`
ORDER BY `redpanda_group` ASC

widgets.description: Cluster health status. 1 = Healthy (no unavailable partitions), 0 = Unhealthy
widgets.title: Cluster Status

widgets.description: Number of active brokers in the Redpanda cluster
widgets.title: Brokers Online

widgets.description: Total number of partitions across all topics in the cluster
widgets.title: Total Partitions

widgets.description: Number of partitions that have fewer replicas than the configured replication factor
widgets.title: Under-replicated Partitions

widgets.description: Rate of bytes produced to the cluster by producers across all topics and partitions
widgets.title: Bytes Produced per Second

widgets.description: Rate of bytes consumed from the cluster by consumers across all topics and partitions
widgets.title: Bytes Consumed per Second

widgets.description: Rate of messages (records) produced to the cluster per second
widgets.title: Messages Produced per Second

widgets.description: Rate of messages (records) fetched/consumed from the cluster per second
widgets.title: Messages Consumed per Second

widgets.description: 99th percentile latency for produce requests in the cluster
widgets.title: Produce Latency p99

widgets.description: 99th percentile latency for fetch/consume requests in the cluster
widgets.title: Fetch Latency p99

widgets.description: Number of partitions per topic showing distribution of data partitioning across the cluster
widgets.title: Topic Partition Count

widgets.description: Total log size in bytes per topic showing disk space consumption
widgets.title: Log Size by Topic

widgets.description: Number of partition leaders per broker showing leadership distribution across the cluster
widgets.title: Partition Leader Count per Broker

widgets.description: Total number of partition replicas across the cluster including both leaders and followers
widgets.title: Partition Replicas

widgets.description: Number of messages a consumer group is behind the latest offset for each topic partition. High lag indicates consumers cannot keep up with producers.
widgets.title: Consumer Group Lag

widgets.description: Number of active members (consumers) in each consumer group
widgets.title: Consumer Group Members

widgets.description: Latest committed offset for each consumer group and topic partition showing consumption progress
widgets.title: Consumer Group Committed Offset

widgets.description: Number of topics each consumer group is subscribed to
widgets.title: Consumer Group Topics

widgets.description: Number of currently active RPC connections between brokers in the cluster for inter-broker communication
widgets.title: RPC Active Connections

widgets.description: Rate of RPC request errors between brokers. Non-zero values may indicate network issues or broker failures.
widgets.title: RPC Request Errors Rate

widgets.description: Rate of Raft leadership changes across partitions. Frequent changes may indicate instability in the cluster.
widgets.title: Raft Leadership Changes Rate

widgets.description: Number of partition movement operations during Raft recovery processes
widgets.title: Raft Recovery Partition Movements

widgets.description: Total CPU busy time in seconds per broker. Rate shows CPU cores used.
widgets.title: CPU Utilization

widgets.description: Amount of memory allocated by Redpanda processes per broker in bytes
widgets.title: Memory Allocated

widgets.description: Amount of free memory available to Redpanda processes per broker
widgets.title: Free Memory

widgets.description: Total disk space used by Redpanda data directories per broker
widgets.title: Storage Used

widgets.description: Available disk space remaining on Redpanda data directories per broker
widgets.title: Storage Free

widgets.description: Total I/O operations queued across all shards per broker showing storage subsystem load
widgets.title: IO Queue Total Operations

widgets.description: Rate of requests handled by the Schema Registry showing registry utilization
widgets.title: Schema Registry Request Rate

widgets.description: Rate of errors returned by the Schema Registry endpoint
widgets.title: Schema Registry Errors

widgets.description: Rate of Kafka produce API requests handled per second by each broker
widgets.title: Kafka API Request Rate - Produce

widgets.description: Rate of Kafka fetch/consume API requests handled per second by each broker
widgets.title: Kafka API Request Rate - Fetch

widgets.description: Rate of Kafka metadata API requests which can indicate excessive client refreshes
widgets.title: Kafka API Request Rate - Metadata

widgets.description: Number of active Kafka client connections per broker showing client load distribution
widgets.title: Kafka Active Connections

widgets.description: Median (50th percentile) latency for produce requests showing typical request performance
widgets.title: Produce Latency p50

widgets.description: Median (50th percentile) latency for fetch/consume requests showing typical consumer performance
widgets.title: Fetch Latency p50

widgets.description: Time series of unavailable partitions. Any non-zero value indicates data availability issues.
widgets.title: Unavailable Partitions Over Time

widgets.description: Time series of under-replicated partitions tracking replication health trends
widgets.title: Under-replicated Partitions Over Time

widgets.description: Number of partitions without an elected leader. Non-zero indicates service disruption for those partitions.
widgets.title: Leaderless Partitions

widgets.description: Number of partitions hosted by each broker showing partition distribution and balance
widgets.title: Broker Partition Count
